name: Volcán de Fuego
eruptionHistory: One of Central America's most active volcanoes. The June 2018 eruption produced devastating pyroclastic flows that killed over 190 people in the village of San Miguel Los Lotes.
description: Volcán de Fuego is one of the most active volcanoes in Central America. Its devastating 2018 eruption was one of the deadliest volcanic disasters in Guatemalan history.
